tasks.name: Human Activity Recognition
tasks.description: Classify a pre-segmented CSI clip into an activity.

tasks.name: Temporal Activity Detection / Localization
tasks.description: Find activity classes and their temporal boundaries in continuous, untrimmed CSI.

tasks.name: Fall Detection and Risk
tasks.description: Detect falls or estimate fall risk.

tasks.name: Vital-sign Monitoring
tasks.description: Estimate respiration, heartbeat, or related physiological signals.

tasks.name: People Counting and Occupancy
tasks.description: Estimate presence or the number of people.

tasks.name: Gesture and Sign Language
tasks.description: Recognize fine-grained hand, arm, or sign-language gestures.

tasks.name: Human Identification
tasks.description: Identify a person from gait or body-induced CSI.

tasks.name: Indoor Spatial Localization
tasks.description: Estimate a room, zone, or physical position; distinct from TAL.

tasks.name: Pose Estimation
tasks.description: Recover body pose or keypoints from WiFi signals.

tasks.name: Motion-source Recognition
tasks.description: Distinguish humans, pets, fans, robots, and other moving sources.

tasks.name: Multi-task and Multimodal
tasks.description: Joint labels or synchronized sensing modalities.

tasks.name: Machine and Industrial Sensing
tasks.description: Recognize machines, operating states, and human-machine activity in industrial settings.
